metadata.name: Exalted — two Akrasan Squires each trigger once when Bog Raiders attacks alone
metadata.description: p1 controls two Akrasan Squires (1/1 with Exalted) and one Bog Raiders (2/2 with Swampwalk). p1 declares only Bog Raiders as an attacker targeting p2. Because exactly one creature attacks (CR 506.5), both Akrasan Squires' Exalted triggered abilities fire (CR 702.83a: each permanent with exalted triggers separately). Both triggers are placed on the stack; each resolves in LIFO order, granting Bog Raiders +1/+1 until end of turn twice. Bog Raiders becomes 4/4 for the combat phase. p2 declares no blockers. Bog Raiders (power 4, unblocked) deals 4 combat damage to p2 (CR 510.1b), reducing p2 life from 40 to 36. At end of turn in the cleanup step (CR 514.2) the 'until end of turn' bonuses expire and Bog Raiders returns to 2/2.
metadata.generation_notes: Akrasan Squire oracle text (Scryfall verified via MCP lookup_card): 'Exalted (Whenever a creature you control attacks alone, that creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.)' Type: Creature — Human Soldier. P/T: 1/1. Mana cost: {W}. Keywords: Exalted. IMPORTANT: Akrasan Squire is NOT in the engine Available Cards list and requires a CardDefinition to be authored (with Exalted triggered ability, CR 702.83a) before this script can pass harness validation. Bog Raiders is used as the 2/2 attacker (the prompt specified Bear 2/2 vanilla but no vanilla 2/2 exists in the Available Cards list; Bog Raiders is 2/2 with Swampwalk which does not affect the scenario since there are no blockers). Bog Raiders starting P/T is 2/2; with two Exalted +1/+1 bonuses it becomes 4/4 for the combat phase and deals 4 damage to p2 (40 - 4 = 36). At cleanup (CR 514.2) the until-end-of-turn effects expire, restoring Bog Raiders to 2/2. Exalted ruling (2008-10-01): If you declare exactly one creature as an attacker, each exalted ability on each permanent you control triggers. Two Akrasan Squires produce two separate Exalted triggered abilities on the stack. Each resolves separately giving +1/+1 (CR 405.5: LIFO). CR 702.83b + 506.5: attacks alone means exactly one creature declared as attacker in the declare attackers step. CR 508.1: Bog Raiders is untapped and free of summoning sickness (placed in initial state via builder). Turn 4 is used to avoid summoning sickness per the established combat script pattern. Exalted triggers fire during the declare-attackers step after Bog Raiders is declared and resolve before blockers are declared. ResolutionEffect.amount is Option<i32> in schema — pump effects use null for amount with description in note field. Dispute schema: step_index/action_index/raised_by/description/resolution/resolved_by/resolved_date.

disputes.description: Akrasan Squire (CR 702.83a: Exalted) is not in the engine Available Cards list and has no CardDefinition. This script will fail harness validation until the card is authored with its Exalted triggered ability. The script is otherwise CR-correct per oracle text (Scryfall verified).

script.step_note: p1 declares only Bog Raiders as an attacker targeting p2. Because exactly one creature attacks (CR 506.5), both Akrasan Squires' Exalted triggered abilities trigger (CR 702.83a). Both triggers are placed on the stack. Bog Raiders becomes tapped (CR 508.1f).

actions.description: Initial: two Akrasan Squires and Bog Raiders untapped on p1 battlefield, life totals 40/40, stack empty
actions.note: All three creatures are untapped and free of summoning sickness (turn 4, placed in initial state via builder). Bog Raiders is the designated sole attacker.

CR 508.1: p1 declares Bog Raiders as the sole attacking creature targeting p2. CR 508.1a: Bog Raiders is untapped and free of summoning sickness — legal attacker. CR 508.1f: Bog Raiders becomes tapped as a side effect of attacking. CR 506.5: Bog Raiders is the only creature declared as an attacker — it attacks alone. CR 702.83a: Each permanent p1 controls with Exalted (both Akrasan Squires) triggers separately, placing two triggered abilities on the stack, each granting Bog Raiders +1/+1 until end of turn.

actions.description: After declare_attackers: Bog Raiders is tapped, two Exalted triggers on the stack
actions.note: CR 508.1f: Bog Raiders tapped as part of attack declaration. CR 702.83a: Two Exalted triggered abilities are on the stack, both targeting Bog Raiders as the creature attacking alone.
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority. Top of stack (first Exalted trigger) resolves. CR 405.5: LIFO order.

resolution.note: CR 702.83a: First Exalted trigger resolves — Bog Raiders gets +1/+1 until end of turn. Effectively 3/3.

actions.note: CR 608.2: First Exalted triggered ability resolves. CR 405.5: LIFO. Bog Raiders gains +1/+1 until end of turn (3/3 effectively).
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority. Second Exalted trigger (from the other Akrasan Squire) now resolves.

resolution.note: CR 702.83a: Second Exalted trigger resolves — Bog Raiders gets another +1/+1 until end of turn. Base 2/2 + 1/1 + 1/1 = 4/4 until end of turn.

actions.note: CR 608.2: Second Exalted triggered ability resolves. Bog Raiders now has two separate +1/+1 until-end-of-turn bonuses, making it effectively 4/4.

actions.description: After both Exalted triggers resolve: stack empty, all p1 creatures on battlefield
actions.note: Both Exalted triggers have resolved. Bog Raiders has +2/+2 until end of turn (4/4). Akrasan Squires are untapped on the battlefield.
CR 116.3d: Both players pass priority in DeclareAttackers with empty stack — advance to DeclareBlockers step.

script.step_note: p2 controls no creatures and declares no blockers. Bog Raiders becomes an unblocked attacker (CR 509.1h). Both players pass — advance to CombatDamage.

actions.note: CR 509.1: p2 declares no blockers (p2 controls no creatures). CR 509.1h: Bog Raiders has no creatures declared as blockers — it becomes an unblocked attacker.

CR 116.3d: Both players pass priority with empty stack — advance to CombatDamage step. The engine executes combat damage as a turn-based action on entering CombatDamage. Bog Raiders (power 4, unblocked) assigns 4 damage to p2 (CR 510.1b).

script.step_note: CombatDamage turn-based action: Bog Raiders (power 4 from two Exalted bonuses, unblocked) assigns 4 combat damage to p2 (CR 510.1b). p2 life: 40 to 36. Bog Raiders takes no damage. No SBAs apply.

actions.note: CR 704.5a: p2 has 36 life (above 0) — no player-death SBA. CR 704.5g: Bog Raiders took no damage — no lethal-damage SBA. No SBAs apply.
CR 116.3d: Both players pass priority after CombatDamage resolves. Stack empty — advance to EndOfCombat step.

actions.description: After combat damage: p2 at 36 life, Bog Raiders still on p1 battlefield (tapped), Akrasan Squires untouched
actions.note: CR 510.1b: Unblocked Bog Raiders (power 4 with two Exalted bonuses) dealt 4 combat damage to p2. p2 life: 40 to 36. Bog Raiders remains on battlefield (tapped from attacking). Akrasan Squires remain untapped. Exalted +2/+2 bonus persists until cleanup.

script.step_note: Cleanup step: all until-end-of-turn effects end simultaneously (CR 514.2). The two Exalted +1/+1 bonuses on Bog Raiders expire. Bog Raiders returns to its base 2/2. All damage marked on permanents is also removed.

actions.description: After cleanup — Exalted bonuses expired: all p1 creatures on battlefield, p2 at 36 life
actions.note: CR 514.2: Until-end-of-turn and this-turn effects end simultaneously in the cleanup step (turn-based action, does not use the stack). Both Exalted +1/+1 bonuses expire, restoring Bog Raiders to its printed 2/2. All three p1 creatures remain on the battlefield. p2 retains 36 life.
